prompt: Create a high-resolution vertical anime cyberpunk action illustration of an original blue-haired elf girl rollerblading through a rainy neon alley at night. The character is a slim teenage-looking anime girl with pale skin, pointed elf ears, short icy blue hair tied into a small side ponytail, red eyes, and a serious focused expression. She is captured in an extreme dynamic low-angle perspective, leaning forward with both arms stretched out for balance as she skates diagonally from the upper right toward the lower left. Her outfit is a black-and-white gothic streetwear maid dress mixed with punk techwear: frilled white apron, black puff sleeves, white ruffle trim, layered skirt, belts, straps, small chains, patches, warning tags, skull motifs, black choker, hair clips, and thigh straps. Include exactly 6 prominent visible outfit graphics or labels: a large “GAME OVER” patch on the apron, a red “GAME OVER” tag near the waist, a “66” patch on the sleeve, a skull-face pouch at the hip, a black cross on one leg warmer, and a red rectangular warning tag hanging from the leg. She wears oversized futuristic inline skates with thick white armor-like shells, black straps, and glowing electric-blue wheels; the rear wheel scrapes the wet pavement, throwing orange sparks at the lower left. Set the scene in a dense futuristic city alley with towering buildings, cables overhead, rain streaks, mist, glossy puddles, and strong reflections in the road. Use neon signs in cyan, pink, and red; include exactly 4 clearly readable major signs: a large vertical graffiti-like “GAME OVER” sign with a skull on the left wall, a red “GAME OVER” sign high on the right building, a cyan “GAME CHAOS” sign in the distance, and a vertical blue Japanese-style sign on the right. Add two small dark pedestrian silhouettes far in the background, one car in the distance, foreground black chains crossing along the bottom edge, and scattered water splashes around the skate wheels. Lighting should be cinematic and high contrast, with blue rim light, magenta reflections, volumetric rain haze, sharp anime linework, ultra-detailed textures, dramatic motion blur only on background edges and sparks, 4K print-quality finish. Avoid extra characters in the foreground, avoid blurry face, avoid watermark, avoid logo overlays, and keep the composition vertical 3:4.
